chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight

subsections.text: The commission by rule may impose restrictions on the weight and size of vehicles to be operated on state highways on the following holidays only:

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 57, eff. September 1, 2011.
